scripts.build-wintab-ia32: npx node-gyp rebuild --directory native/wintab --target=30.0.0 --arch=ia32 --dist-url=https://electronjs.org/headers && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path native\wintab\build\Release\wintab.node -Destination standalone\wintab-ia32.node -Force"
scripts.build-wintab-x64: npx node-gyp rebuild --directory native/wintab --target=30.0.0 --arch=x64 --dist-url=https://electronjs.org/headers && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path native\wintab\build\Release\wintab.node -Destination standalone\wintab-x64.node -Force"
scripts.buildElectron: yarn release && rm -rf standalone/app/ && cp -R app/ standalone/ && cp package.json standalone && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('standalone/package.json', 'utf8')); delete pkg.type; fs.writeFileSync('standalone/package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2), 'utf8');"
scripts.standalone: yarn buildElectron && cd standalone && node buildStandalone.js
